items.headline: Over 1 Million HDB Households to Receive U-Save and S&CC Rebates in July
items.summary: More than one million Singaporean HDB households will automatically receive utility bill (U-Save) rebates and service and conservancy charge rebates in July 2026. The rebates are part of the government's ongoing cost-of-living support package.
items.meaning: If you live in an HDB flat, check your July bills as the rebates will be credited automatically with no action needed on your part.
items.headline_zh: 逾百万HDB住户将于7月自动获得U-Save及S&CC回扣
items.summary_zh: 2026年7月，超过百万个新加坡HDB住户将自动获得水电费（U-Save）回扣及市镇服务与保养费（S&CC）回扣，这是政府持续推出的生活费援助配套的一部分。
items.meaning_zh: 如果你住HDB组屋，记得查看7月的账单——回扣会自动存入，不需要另外申请。

items.headline: Punggol Executive Flat Is the First of Its Type to Cross $900,000
items.summary: An executive HDB flat in Punggol sold for over $900,000, the first such unit in Singapore to breach that level. Notably it was not a high-floor unit, showing buyers are paying top dollar even without the view premium.
items.meaning: Executive HDB flats are hitting new price highs even for mid-floor units, a clear sign that demand in this segment remains strong.
items.stat_label: first exec flat to hit this price
items.headline_zh: 榜鹅执行式组屋首破$900,000大关
items.summary_zh: 榜鹅一间执行式HDB组屋以逾$900,000成交，成为新加坡首个突破这个价位的同类单位。值得注意的是，这并非高楼层单位，说明买家愿意出顶价，并不依赖景观加持。
items.meaning_zh: 执行式HDB组屋价格屡创新高，连中层单位也不例外，清楚反映出这个市场的需求依然强劲。
items.stat_label_zh: 首个达到此价位的执行式组屋

items.headline: Upcoming Admiralty EC Carries a 10-Year Minimum Occupation Period
items.summary: An analysis of the new Admiralty executive condominium reveals it will come with a 10-year minimum occupation period before owners can sell on the open market, double the usual five years for standard ECs. Pricing may be set more competitively to account for this tighter restriction.
items.meaning: If you are considering this EC, go in knowing you are locked in for a decade before you can cash out, so only commit if you are comfortable holding that long.
items.stat_label: minimum occupation period for this EC
items.headline_zh: 即将推出的义顺EC最低居住期长达10年
items.summary_zh: 对新义顺执行共管公寓（EC）的分析显示，业主须满足10年最低居住期才能在公开市场出售单位——比一般EC的5年整整多了一倍。定价或许会相对具竞争力，以反映这一更严格的限制。
items.meaning_zh: 若你在考虑这个EC，要清楚了解持有期长达10年才能套现，只有在你确定愿意长期持有的情况下才适合出手。

items.headline: New EC Site at Admiralty Walk Launched for Developer Tender
items.summary: The government put a new executive condominium site at Admiralty Walk in Sembawang up for sale to developers, with capacity for roughly 450 homes. The site adds to the EC supply pipeline in the North.
items.meaning: A new EC project in Sembawang is coming, giving upgraders in that part of Singapore another option to track over the next year or so.
items.headline_zh: 义顺坊新EC地段招标，可建约450个单位
items.summary_zh: 政府将三巴旺义顺坊一幅执行共管公寓（EC）地段推出招标，预计可容纳约450个住宅单位，进一步充实北部地区的EC供应。
items.meaning_zh: 三巴旺将有新EC项目推出，为该区域有意提升住房的买家提供多一个选择，值得在未来一年左右持续关注。

items.headline: Rising Material Costs and Labour Shortage Push Up Construction Costs in Singapore
items.summary: Developers and builders are facing higher costs as commodity prices climb and the construction workforce stays stretched thin. These pressures are expected to flow through into new home prices.
items.meaning: New launches are unlikely to get cheaper any time soon because the cost of building them keeps going up.
items.headline_zh: 材料价格上涨加上劳工短缺，新加坡建筑成本持续走高
items.summary_zh: 随着原材料价格上升、建筑业劳动力持续吃紧，发展商和承建商面对更高的建设成本，预计这些压力最终将反映在新楼盘价格上。
items.meaning_zh: 由于建筑成本持续攀升，新推出楼盘的售价短期内不太可能下降。

items.headline: Pasir Ris EC That Launched Near $500,000: How It Has Held Up 13 Years On
items.summary: A review of a Pasir Ris executive condominium that launched at around $500,000 per unit tracks how prices and returns have moved over 13 years, giving prospective EC buyers a real-world performance yardstick.
items.meaning: Seeing how an actual EC played out over a full decade is one of the most honest ways to judge whether buying one today is likely to pay off.
items.headline_zh: 当年约$500,000起售的巴西立EC，13年后表现如何？
items.summary_zh: 这篇回顾追踪了一个巴西立执行共管公寓（EC）自推出至今13年间的价格走势和投资回报，为有意购买EC的买家提供真实的参考依据。
items.meaning_zh: 了解一个EC在超过十年后的实际表现，是衡量现在买EC是否值得的最直接方式之一。

items.headline: Singapore Private Condo and HDB Markets Are Moving on Separate Tracks, NUS Survey Finds
items.summary: An NUS survey concludes that Singapore's private condo market and the HDB resale market are increasingly driven by different buyer pools and are no longer moving in lockstep with each other.
items.meaning: Do not use private condo price trends as a guide to where HDB flat prices are going, or vice versa; each market now needs to be read on its own data.
items.headline_zh: NUS调查：新加坡私人condo与HDB市场各走各路
items.summary_zh: 新加坡国立大学（NUS）的调查指出，新加坡私人condo市场与HDB转售市场的买家群体越来越不同，两者的价格走势已不再同步。
items.meaning_zh: 不要用私人condo的价格走势来预测HDB组屋的方向，反之亦然——两个市场现在需要分别以各自的数据来解读。

items.headline: The Case For Offering 5-Room Flats in the Berlayar Prime Location BTO
items.summary: Business Times argues that including 5-room flats in the Berlayar prime location BTO is worthwhile even though these units will cost more due to the stricter resale and rental rules that come with prime location housing projects.
items.meaning: If you want a large flat in a central location and can live with the tighter resale conditions, a Berlayar 5-room BTO could still be worth the higher price.
items.headline_zh: Berlayar优先地点BTO为何值得纳入5房式单位？
items.summary_zh: 《商业时报》认为，在Berlayar优先地点BTO项目中加入5房式单位是值得的，尽管受到优先地点房屋计划较严格的转售和出租限制，这些单位的价格会更高。
items.meaning_zh: 如果你想在核心地段拥有一间大单位，又能接受更严格的转售条件，Berlayar的5房式BTO仍然可能值得考虑。
